rules.description: Decline if an active bankruptcy is present.
Refer if a bankruptcy is present but not marked active.
Refer when credit score is below the configured product threshold.
Refer when stated income differs materially from verified income.
Refer when fraud/device risk exceeds configured tolerance.
Counteroffer when loan-to-value is too high but can be fixed with down payment.
Refer older collateral for manual review.

ACTIVE_BANKRUPTCY.internalExplanation: Active bankruptcy was reported on the credit/application data.
ACTIVE_BANKRUPTCY.consumerExplanation: Recent bankruptcy information affected the application.

RECENT_BANKRUPTCY.internalExplanation: Bankruptcy history requires an underwriter review before final decision.
RECENT_BANKRUPTCY.consumerExplanation: Bankruptcy history affected the application review.

LOW_CREDIT_SCORE.internalExplanation: Credit score is below the configured threshold for the requested product.
LOW_CREDIT_SCORE.consumerExplanation: Credit score did not meet the program guideline.

LIMITED_CREDIT_HISTORY.internalExplanation: Open tradelines or oldest tradeline age indicate limited credit depth.
LIMITED_CREDIT_HISTORY.consumerExplanation: Limited credit history affected the application.

RECENT_DELINQUENCY.internalExplanation: Recent 60+ or 90+ day delinquency was reported.

HIGH_DTI.internalExplanation: Debt-to-income ratio exceeds the configured guideline.
HIGH_DTI.consumerExplanation: Debt obligations were high compared with income.

HIGH_PTI.internalExplanation: Proposed payment-to-income ratio exceeds the configured guideline.
HIGH_PTI.consumerExplanation: The requested payment was high compared with income.

INSUFFICIENT_VERIFIED_INCOME.internalExplanation: Verified income is missing or insufficient for the requested obligation.
INSUFFICIENT_VERIFIED_INCOME.consumerExplanation: Verified income was not sufficient for the requested terms.

INCOME_MISMATCH.internalExplanation: Stated income materially differs from verified income.
INCOME_MISMATCH.consumerExplanation: Income information could not be verified as stated.

EXCESSIVE_OVERDRAFTS.internalExplanation: Bank data shows overdrafts above configured tolerance.
EXCESSIVE_OVERDRAFTS.consumerExplanation: Recent account overdraft activity affected the review.

UNSTABLE_CASH_FLOW.internalExplanation: Deposit, payroll, or balance trends suggest unstable cash flow.
UNSTABLE_CASH_FLOW.consumerExplanation: Deposit or balance patterns affected the review.

CONSISTENT_PAYROLL_DEPOSITS.internalExplanation: Consistent payroll deposits support repayment capacity.
CONSISTENT_PAYROLL_DEPOSITS.consumerExplanation: Consistent payroll deposits supported the review.

HIGH_LTV.internalExplanation: Requested amount financed exceeds maximum loan-to-value.
HIGH_LTV.consumerExplanation: The amount requested was high compared with collateral value.

COLLATERAL_TOO_OLD.consumerExplanation: Collateral age affected the application review.

HIGH_MILEAGE.consumerExplanation: Vehicle mileage affected the application review.

STRONG_MEMBER_RELATIONSHIP.internalExplanation: Long member/customer tenure is a positive relationship factor.

HIGH_APPLICATION_FRAUD_RISK.internalExplanation: Fraud/device/identity signals exceed configured risk tolerance.
HIGH_APPLICATION_FRAUD_RISK.consumerExplanation: Identity or application verification requires additional review.

IDENTITY_NOT_VERIFIED.internalExplanation: Identity verification is missing or failed.
IDENTITY_NOT_VERIFIED.consumerExplanation: Identity verification could not be completed.

LOW_REVOLVING_UTILIZATION.consumerExplanation: Low revolving balances supported the review.

MISSING_REQUIRED_DATA.consumerExplanation: Additional information is needed to complete the review.
